data.name: 體欲大競賽
data.detailed_description:
一個現實生活中的Loser莫名其妙地找到了一份體育醫生的工作，不過他顯然把所有時間都花在了偷窺和偷拍各種女運動員在賽場上（和賽場下）的一舉一動上。

這個色狼的一切都進行得非常順利，直到他被一位名叫高宮玲奈的網球女孩在比賽中逮捕個正著，因為他正在用閃光燈偷拍！玲奈認為，與其把他大罵一頓、解僱、或被列入相關領域的黑名單，掌握一些這個偷窺狂的勒索材料對她來說好處更多。

玲奈現在是網球明星，但她的遠大目標是未來在許多運動中都獲得第一名。她的小心思是，讓我們這個性慾旺盛的主角噁心一下目前佔據榜首位置的其他女孩，希望他的變態偷窺行為能分散她們的訓練注意力，這樣她的比賽生涯會更加一帆風順。

玲奈允許你對其他女孩放縱自己，而你則釋放出淫蕩的物理治療技術的禁忌力量，這似乎是雙贏的局面。你有一群沉迷於性愛的後宮隨時聽候你的差遣，而玲奈的對手們也不再妨礙她。但當你得知玲奈並沒有可以敲詐勒索你的資料，你就更心安理得了。

也許在你的後宮的幫助下，你能在今年的陰部奧運會上奪得所有項目的金牌，還能把玲奈變成性玩具！







遊戲特色

- 忠實再現日本原創視覺小說

- 每位運動員都有原始日語對白配音

- 原畫高清升級，提供 16:9 和 4:3 兩種版本

- 點擊閱讀數小時的故事內容

- 音訊包括音樂和特效

- 增強的動畫角色渲染

- CG 圖庫與場景選擇

- 體驗一​​場性愛的雙重馬拉松，20 多個 H 場景盡在其中！

體欲大競賽是多產的日本開發商 Miel 原創視覺小說的英文在地化版本。 Cherry Kiss 的目標是為日本以外的玩家提供原汁原味的日本視覺小說體驗。

**請注意**

本遊戲中所描述和直觀表現的所有角色均已年滿 18 歲，在本遊戲的製作過程中沒有使用任何實際或可識別的未成年人。

data.short_description: 如果你喜歡運動的觀賞性、競技性以及豐滿、搖擺、抖動的乳房，那麼請務必遊玩本作！在這裡，您將欣賞到一場真正的體育競技表演，當然少不了令人汗流浹背的性愛！
data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 泰文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 / 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX-compatible sound

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Version: 10.10+
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core M
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Open GL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Pussylympics
data.detailed_description:
Somehow a true-life degenerate scored a job as a sports physician, so obviously he spends all his time ogling and snapping candid pics of the various lady athletes doing their thing on (and off) the field.

Everything is going as well as it can be for your local pervert, until one of the tennis players, Reina Takamiya, catches him with his flash on, taking pictures of her mid match! Instead of getting chewed out, fired, and blacklisted. Reina thinks having some blackmail material on a dirty little peeping pervert might benefit her.

Reina might be a tennis star for now, but her grand ambition is to take the #1 spot in many sports. She wants to sick our horned-up protagonist on the other girls who currently hold those top spots. In hopes that his perverted antics will distract them from training and make her life easier.

Reina sets you loose upon the other girls and you unleash the forbidden power of your naughty physiotherapy techniques, it all seems like a win-win situation. You have a harem of mindless sex addicted meat toilets at obedient to your every demand and Reina's rivals are out of her way. But it would put your mind at ease knowing Reina wasn't holding onto some blackmail material.

With the help of your harem you can go for the gold in every event in this year's Pussylympics and make a sex toy out of Reina too! 



- A posh privileged beauty who's not looking to play fair when it comes to getting into some new sports arenas.  


- This virgin volleyball superstar has a high sense of morals, for how long? I guess that's to be determined. 


 - She's a high performing swimmer looking to better her lap time no matter what it takes, she will do anything...


- She'swell respected by her team, kind hearted but can be a hard ass, which is a good quality to have in a track super-star. 

FEATURES

• Faithful recreation of the original Japanese Visual Novel

• Each athlete is fully voiced with original Japanese dialogue

• Original artwork HD upscaled with 16:9 and 4:3 variants

• Click though and read hours of story content

• Audio including music and special effects

• Enhanced with animated character sprites

• A CG Gallery and Scene selections

• Experience a sexual double-decathalon, more than 20, H-Scenes in this one!

Pussylympics is the English localization of a Visual Novel originally created by prolific Japanese developer Miel. We at Cherry Kiss aim to provide an authentic Japanese Visual Novel experience to gamers outside of Japan.

**PLEASE NOTE**

All characters described and visually represented in this game are over 18 years of age, and no actual, nor identifiable minor was used in the production of this game.

data.short_description: If you love sports for the drama, the athleticism, and the gravid, swinging, jiggling BREASTS, you have a moral obligation to tune into the Pussylympics. See a real tour de force of terrible sportsmanship, and sweaty child-making sex!
data.supported_languages: English, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Thai, Traditional Chinese

  • OS *: Windows 7 / 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • Processor: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX-compatible sound

  • Processor: Apple M1 or Intel Core M
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Open GL 3.0
  • Storage: 2 GB available space

Minimum:

  • Processor: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 3.0
